name: Grilled Portobella Mushrooms with Mango Chutn
recipeInstructions:
1. Carefully remove the stems from the mushrooms and clean them thoroughly.
2. Marinate the mushroom caps in a mixture of vinegar, miso paste, and soy sauce for about an hour.
3. Dice the mango and pepper, and chop the jalapeno. Toss with a little vinegar.
4. Clean the lettuce and separate into individual leaves.
5. Grill the marinated mushrooms on both sides. When grilling the top side, turn the mushroom 90 degrees halfway through to create a square or diamond crosshatch pattern.
6. To serve, fan three lettuce leaves on the plate, center the grilled mushroom, and place a dollop of chutney on either side.
7. Enjoy!
